layouts.name: Zine Rack
layouts.prompt:
Generate a portfolio interface.

Design-space scaffold:
- x Visible to Friction: 0.38 (0 = Visible, 1 = Friction)
- y Abstract to Skeuomorphic: 0.39 (0 = Abstract, 1 = Skeuomorphic)
- Nearby template anchors: Clothesline + Desk
- User-defined axis constraints:
- Visible to Friction: 0.38 (0 = Visible, 1 = Friction); marked as X map axis; nearby/corrected interfaces: Clothesline 0.38, Desk 0.58, Grid 0.07
- Abstract to Skeuomorphic: 0.39 (0 = Abstract, 1 = Skeuomorphic); marked as Y map axis; nearby/corrected interfaces: Night Market 0.52, Directory 0.20, Clothesline 0.68
- Manual note positions are artist corrections. Treat them as stronger evidence than the initial AI ranking.
- Treat this as a research prototype position, not a generic style axis.

Design clarification answers:
- Which world should frame your portfolio?
  Answer: Zine Rack
  Rationale: Works live as zine spines standing upright in a rack — tilt one forward to fan its pages open, each spread a piece.
- When someone opens your zine rack, how do they move through it?
  Answer: Browse the spines, pull one out
  Rationale: Visitor sees all zine spines upright at once, scans titles/covers, then selects one to open fully — overview before dept
- What is this zine rack mainly doing for you right now?
  Answer: Archiving the body of work
  Rationale: Rack is a complete run — every zine dated and filed, built for your own record as much as any visitor

layouts.name: Aqua City
layouts.prompt:
REFERENCE_FIDELITY: high
Use the uploaded image as a style reference, not a literal scene copy.
Preserve the visual language, palette, texture, interface metaphor, and interaction mood. Generalize specific objects/text into reusable portfolio components.
Summary: A vibrant, immersive nature-meets-urban interface blending aquatic life with green energy and cityscape elements.
Visual style: photorealistic, high contrast, vivid colors, dynamic water effects
Mood: energetic, fresh, hopeful, futuristic
Palette: sky blue #6ec1e4 (background), fresh green #4caf50 (accent), sun yellow #ffeb3b (highlight), coral orange #ff7043 (primary), deep ocean blue #0277bd (secondary)
Typography personality: modern, clean, bold
Layout composition: layered foreground and background with overlapping elements
Layout texture: water ripple and splash textures
Components: interactive splash overlays, floating fish icons or avatars, wind turbine feature highlights, cityscape background panels, bubble or dome-shaped containers
Interface metaphor: immersive ecosystem blending water, nature, and urban life
Navigation: scroll or hover to reveal layered content with fluid transitions
Interaction pace: lingering with smooth transitions
Generator brief: Create a vibrant portfolio interface inspired by a dynamic aquatic ecosystem merging with green energy and urban elements. Use layered water splash effects, colorful tropical fish icons, and transparent dome-shaped info containers to evoke immersion and freshness. Employ a modern, bold typography with vivid blues, greens, and coral accents, and incorporate smooth fluid animations and interactive overlays for a hopefu

Design clarification answers:

layouts.name: Card Catalog
layouts.prompt:
A skeuomorphic filing cabinet portfolio where each collection is a labeled drawer. The user must click a drawer to open it, revealing the images inside as papers or folders. Keep the cabinet closed by default and show the full artwork inside the opened drawer.

Design clarification answers:
- The filing cabinet is your starting world. What material universe should it live in?
  Answer: Warm wooden card catalog in a library reading ro
  Rationale: Polished oak, brass pulls, typed index cards — each drawer has the heft of a library reference system
- When a visitor opens a drawer, how do the artworks reveal themselves?
  Answer: Hanging folder drop
  Rationale: Folders accordion-drop into view; visitor clicks a folder tab to lay it flat and see the full artwork spread inside
- What is this card catalog portfolio mainly doing for you right now?
  Answer: Professional archive
  Rationale: Every drawer is a dated series; the cabinet reads as a complete, citable body of work

layouts.name: Dream Pages
layouts.prompt:
REFERENCE_FIDELITY: high
Use the uploaded image as a style reference, not a literal scene copy.
Preserve the visual language, palette, texture, material system, composition density, motif vocabulary, and interaction mood. Generalize specific objects/text into reusable portfolio components.
Do not collapse the image into a generic existing metaphor. The generated interface should visibly inherit the reference image in the first viewport.
Summary: A dreamy, pastel-hued collage blending whimsical doodles and soft floral motifs with layered translucency.
Keywords: dreamy, whimsical, pastel
Visual style: watercolor washes, hand-drawn pencil and ink linework, soft pastel overlays
Material system: translucent vellum layers, soft bloom glow, hand-drawn sketch marks over watercolor backgrounds
Mood: gentle, nostalgic, calming
Palette: pastel pink #f7d7db (background), soft lavender #cbb8d8 (accents), muted peach #f4c7b8 (highlights), pale mint green #c6e2d7 (details)
Typography personality: handwritten, soft, playful
Layout composition: layered collage with overlapping translucent elements and floating motifs
Layout texture: paper grain with watercolor bleed and pencil sketch texture
Must preserve: translucent layering, hand-drawn sketch marks, soft pastel color overlays
Motif vocabulary: butterflies, stars and sparkles, flowers, cute cartoon doodles, handwritten notes, translucent drink cup with straw, clouds
Components: floating translucent profile card, section poster links with hand-drawn frames, delicate iconography with sketch style, background collage panels
Interface components: floating cards, hand-drawn buttons, sketch-style icons, background collage panels
Interface metaphor: a dreamy scrapbook or diary page layered with translucent paper and doodles
Navigation: scrolling vertical flow with floating interactive elements and soft fade transitions
Motion: soft fade-ins, slow parallax layering, subtle shimmer on sparkles
Interaction pace: lingering and gentle
Generator brief: Create a portfolio interface inspired by a dreamy, pastel-hued collage blending whimsical hand-drawn doodles and soft floral motifs. Use translucent vellum layering with watercolor washes and pencil sketch textures to evoke a nostalgic, scrapbook-like feel. Incorporate floating butterflies, stars, and cute cartoon elements as interactive motifs, paired with handwritten, playful typography. Avoid a generic gallery or flat layout; instead, emphasize layered translucency, soft bloom glows, and gentle parallax motion for a calming, ethereal user experience.

layouts.name: Quilt
layouts.prompt:
Generate from the uploaded reference image.

Image-derived design contract:
REFERENCE_FIDELITY: high
Use the uploaded image as a style reference, not a literal scene copy.
Preserve the visual language, palette, texture, material system, composition density, motif vocabulary, and interaction mood. Generalize specific objects/text into reusable portfolio components.
Do not collapse the image into a generic existing metaphor. The generated interface should visibly inherit the reference image in the first viewport.
Summary: A vintage floral patchwork quilt aesthetic with soft, muted colors and delicate embroidery textures.
Keywords: vintage, floral, textured
Visual style: textile texture, embroidered floral patterns, soft pastel palette
Material system: fabric texture overlay, stitched seam lines, embroidered thread detail
Layout contract background: layered quilt patchwork with visible stitched seams
Layout contract density: moderate visual density with spaced floral motifs
Layout contract composition: grid-based patch blocks with varied floral embroidery patterns
Required motifs: embroidered roses, small floral clusters, stitched seam lines dividing patches
Required materials: fabric weave texture, embroidery thread detail, quilted stitch pattern
Forbidden simplifications: flat color blocks, plain grid without texture or embroidery
Mood: nostalgic, cozy, gentle
Palette: sage green #8a9a5b (primary patch color), dusty rose #c88c8c (accent patch color), cream #f5f0e6 (background patch color), soft pink #d9a3a3 (floral detail)
Typography personality: classic, soft, handcrafted
Layout composition: structured grid with patch blocks of varying floral embroidery
Layout texture: fabric weave and thread embroidery
Must preserve: visible stitched seam lines, embroidered floral motifs within patch blocks, textile texture overlay
Motif vocabulary: embroidered roses, small flower clusters, stitched seam lines, quilt patch shapes
Components: patch block cards, stitched border containers, floral motif icons
Interface components: stitched patch cards, embroidered floral icons, textured background panels
Interface metaphor: a handcrafted quilt made of embroidered fabric patches
Navigation: grid-based patch blocks linking to portfolio sections
Motion: soft fade and texture highlight on hover
Interaction pace: slow and gentle
Generator brief: Create a portfolio website interface inspired by a vintage floral patchwork quilt featuring soft pastel colors and embroidered floral motifs. Use a grid layout of patch blocks separated by stitched seam lines with fabric weave texture overlays to evoke textile depth. Incorporate delicate embroidered roses and flower clusters as recurring decorative motifs, ensuring the interface preserves visible stitching and fabric texture. Avoid flat or plain grid designs; instead, emphasize handcrafted softness and nostalgic warmth with slow, gentle hover animations that highlight thread details.

layouts.name: Grand Hotel
layouts.prompt:
Generate from the uploaded reference image of the Wes Anderson Budapest hotel.

Image-derived design contract:
REFERENCE_FIDELITY: high
Use the uploaded image as a style reference, not a literal scene copy.
Preserve the visual language, palette, texture, material system, composition density, motif vocabulary, and interaction mood. Generalize specific objects/text into reusable portfolio components.
Do not collapse the image into a generic existing metaphor. The generated interface should visibly inherit the reference image in the first viewport.
Summary: A whimsical, symmetrical hotel facade set against a dramatic mountain backdrop with vintage typography.
Keywords: whimsical, symmetrical, vintage
Visual style: pastel color palette, soft lighting, detailed architectural linework
Material system: matte painted textures, soft shadow gradients, subtle highlights on edges
Layout contract background: full-bleed scenic mountain backdrop with waterfall on one side
Layout contract density: medium density with clear focus on central building facade
Layout contract composition: symmetrical horizontal layout with centered entrance and balanced towers
Required motifs: symmetrical pink hotel facade, arched main entrance with signage, mountain peaks behind building, waterfall on right side
Required materials: matte pastel paint effect, soft shadowing on architectural elements, gold vintage typography
Forbidden simplifications: flat minimalism, asymmetrical layouts, modern brutalist style
Mood: nostalgic, storybook, elegant
Palette: pastel pink #f4c6d0 (building facade), muted gold #d4af37 (typography and accents), deep green #3a4a3f (mountain shadows), soft beige #f0e6d2 (background sky)
Typography personality: vintage, elegant, ornate
Layout composition: strict horizontal symmetry with central focal point
Layout texture: matte painted surface with soft shadows
Must preserve: symmetrical facade, arched entrance signage, mountain backdrop with waterfall
Motif vocabulary: arched doorways, symmetrical windows, mountain silhouettes, waterfall streams, ornate signage
Components: hero banner with symmetrical building, vintage style navigation bar, section cards with ornate borders
Interface components: hero image with overlay text, ornate button styles, section headers with vintage typography
Interface metaphor: a grand vintage hotel facade welcoming visitors
Navigation: horizontal top navigation with symmetrical balance
Motion: subtle fade and scale on hover
Interaction pace: measured and elegant
Generator brief: Generate a portfolio website inspired by a whimsical, symmetrical pink hotel facade set against a dramatic mountain backdrop with a waterfall. Use a pastel pink and muted gold palette with matte painted textures and soft shadow gradients to evoke vintage elegance. The layout should emphasize strict horizontal symmetry with a central arched entrance and balanced towers, layered over a scenic mountain background. Include ornate vintage typography in uppercase with letter spacing, subtle fade and scale hover effects, and avoid flat minimalism or asymmetrical designs to preserve the storybook charm.

Design clarification answers:

layouts.name: Signal Tower
layouts.prompt:
Generate a portfolio interface.

Design direction:
Make something that feels like: Earned View + symbolic object.
Use these as starting points: Aqua City + Directory.
Other cues:
- Visible to Friction: Earned View
- Abstract to Skeuomorphic: symbolic object

Design clarification answers:
- The design calls for an Earned View with a symbolic object feel. Which world should visitors pass through before seeing the work?
  Answer: Signal Tower
  Rationale: A broadcast console with frequency dials; tuning to the right channel surfaces a collection — abstract instrument, not a
- A visitor reaches the Signal Tower. How do they tune in to find a collection?
  Answer: Intercept a transmission
  Rationale: Static fills the screen; fragments of work bleed through until the visitor clicks a flickering signal to resolve the ful
- The Signal Tower is tuned. What is this portfolio primarily broadcasting right now?
  Answer: Living archive
  Rationale: The tower holds every frequency — older and newer work coexist, the interface rewards deep tuning over quick summary

layouts.name: Studio Room
layouts.prompt: A skeuomorphic studio room portfolio where furniture represents collections. Clicking furniture opens a side panel containing the corresponding artwork.
layouts.examplePrompt: A skeuomorphic studio room portfolio where furniture represents collections. Clicking furniture opens a side panel containing the corresponding artwork.

layouts.name: Fairground
layouts.prompt:
a carousal portfolio that spins with horses !!

Design direction:
Make something that feels like: slow reveal + world fragment.
Use these as starting points: Desk + Aqua City.
Other cues:
- Visible to Friction: slow reveal
- Abstract to Skeuomorphic: world fragment

Design clarification answers:
- Your carousel spins with horses — what world does it exist inside?
  Answer: Fairground at Dusk
  Rationale: A worn wooden carousel platform lit by bare bulbs, peeling gilt paint, sawdust underfoot — artwork panels appear on each
- How does a visitor experience the carousel as it spins?
  Answer: Catch a Horse
  Rationale: Carousel spins freely; visitor clicks a passing horse to stop it and reveal the artwork panel — timing and choice matter
- Who are you stopping the carousel for right now?
  Answer: The Keeper of Records
  Rationale: Built as a personal archive — every horse is a piece preserved, the carousel a living catalog of the full body of work o

layouts.name: Painted World
layouts.prompt:
Generate from the uploaded reference image.

Image-derived design contract:
REFERENCE_FIDELITY: high
Use the uploaded image as a style reference, not a literal scene copy.
Preserve the visual language, palette, texture, material system, composition density, motif vocabulary, and interaction mood. Generalize specific objects/text into reusable portfolio components.
Do not collapse the image into a generic existing metaphor. The generated interface should visibly inherit the reference image in the first viewport.
Summary: A vibrant, painterly portrait blending whimsical natural motifs with expressive brushwork.
Keywords: vibrant, whimsical, painterly
Visual style: impasto brushwork, bold color layering, textured paint strokes
Material system: thick acrylic or oil paint texture, visible brush strokes, layered color washes
Layout contract background: dynamic, colorful brush stroke textures with floral overlays
Layout contract density: medium to dense with layered textures and focal floral-eye elements
Layout contract composition: central symmetrical face with floral eye motifs anchoring the layout
Required motifs: large stylized eyes framed by purple flowers, leaf shapes integrated into face, fur-like brush stroke clusters
Required materials: thick paint texture, visible brush strokes, layered color washes
Forbidden simplifications: flat vector shapes, minimalist iconography, plain photographic backgrounds
Mood: playful, energetic
Palette: bright orange #f57c00 (accent), deep blue #1a237e (shadow), soft cream #f3e5f5 (base fur), vibrant purple #6a1b9a (floral eyes), leaf green #388e3c (leaf accents)
Typography personality: expressive, artistic
Layout composition: central symmetrical with layered brush stroke textures
Layout texture: thick paint texture with visible strokes
Must preserve: central floral eye motif, layered brush stroke texture, vibrant color layering
Motif vocabulary: stylized eyes, flower petals, leaf shapes, fur brush strokes
Components: large hero portrait with floral eye focus, text blocks with brush stroke backgrounds, button styles mimicking paint strokes
Interface components: hero image, section cards with textured backgrounds, paint stroke style buttons
Interface metaphor: a living painted portrait with floral accents
Navigation: scroll or click through layered brush stroke panels
Motion: subtle brush stroke shimmer or color shifts on hover
Interaction pace: lingering, exploratory
Generator brief: Generate a vibrant portfolio interface inspired by a painterly cat portrait with large floral eyes. Use thick brush stroke textures and layered color washes in bright oranges, deep blues, purples, and greens. Centralize a symmetrical floral eye motif as the hero element, with textured backgrounds and paint stroke style buttons. Preserve the lively, whimsical painterly feel with subtle hover animations that mimic brush stroke shimmer. Avoid flat vector or minimalist styles to keep the rich tactile quality.

Forbidden simplifications: flat vector shapes, minimalist iconography, plain photographic backgrounds
Mood: playful, energetic
Palette: bright orange #f57c00 (accent), deep blue #1a237e (shadow), soft cream #f3e5f5 (base fur), vibrant purple #6a1b9a (floral eyes), leaf green #388e3c (leaf accents)
Typography personality: expressive, artistic
Layout composition: central symmetrical with layered brush stroke textures
Layout texture: thick paint texture with visible strokes
Must preserve: central floral eye motif, layered brush stroke texture, vibrant color layering
Motif vocabulary: stylized eyes, flower petals, leaf shapes, fur brush strokes
Components: large hero portrait with floral eye focus, text blocks with brush stroke backgrounds, button styles mimicking paint strokes
Interface components: hero image, section cards with textured backgrounds, paint stroke style buttons
Interface metaphor: a living painted portrait with floral accents
Navigation: scroll or click through layered brush stroke panels
Motion: subtle brush stroke shimmer or color shifts on hover
Interaction pace: lingering, exploratory
Generator brief: Generate a vibrant portfolio interface inspired by a painterly cat portrait with large floral eyes. Use thick brush stroke textures and layered color washes in bright oranges, deep blues, purples, and greens. Centralize a symmetrical floral eye motif as the hero element, with textured backgrounds and paint stroke style buttons. Preserve the lively, whimsical painterly feel with subtle hover animations that mimic brush stroke shimmer. Avoid flat vector or minimalist styles to keep the rich tactile quality.
